name: Headache treatment inquiry
description: Patient asks about a 'thing' for their headaches without specifying what they need.
goal: Get clarification on the specific headache treatment or medication the patient is referring to.
behavior: Start by mentioning headaches and needing 'that thing'
Sound slightly unsure and seek clarification
Be open to suggestions or prompts from the agent to narrow down the options
success_criteria: Agent asks clarifying questions to identify the specific treatment or medication
Agent does not make assumptions about the treatment
Agent offers to look up the patient's recent prescriptions or treatment plans if needed
orchestrator_hint: Patient asks about 'that thing for my headaches' without specifying medication or treatment.
